sections.title: If the player has at least 75 combat level

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: I see we have a new arrival. A bringer of death. Tell me, have you come to serve the balance?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Bringer of death, have you come to serve the balance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another assignment.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: You are to bring balance to [amount] [monster] in [area].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I cancel that task?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Your task has been cancelled.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, great!

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Once the balance has been served, return to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is that area?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, great!

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Once the balance has been served, return to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, great!

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Once the balance has been served, return to me.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: You're still bringing balance to [task monster]; you have [amount] to go. Come back when you're finished.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: You're still meant to be bringing balance to [monster] in [area], with [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Bringer of death, I do not feel you are ready for your current task. If you wish, I can cancel it. This will not wipe your task streaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Very well. If you still wish to maintain the balance, you can get a new assignment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Then I wish you well, bringer of death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Those who serve the balance are always rewarded. I can grant these rewards. I can also grant you the equipment needed to serve the balance, for a price of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: When tasking you to serve the balance, I do not currently consider your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I can handle any task.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Your zeal is to be commended. Use it well when serving the balance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In future, please don't give anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: As you wish. From now on, your combat level will be taken into account when tasks are assigned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: When tasking you to serve the balance, I consider your combat level, so you shouldn't get anything too challenging.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I don't want anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Then we will continue on our current path.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop checking my combat level - I can take anything!

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Your zeal is to be commended. From now on, your combat level will not be considered when tasks are assigned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather not.

sections.title: If the player does not have at least 75 combat level

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: I see we have a new arrival. A bringer of death. Tell me, have you come to serve the balance?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Bringer of death, have you come to serve the balance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: A guardian of life, and a bringer of death. There must always be a balance. My people and I serve this balance. You could serve the balance as well, but you'll need some practice first.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: There is a Slayer Master in Burthorpe, he goes by the name of Turael. Learn from him, and you will soon be ready to serve.

sections.title: If the player is near Konar

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: Bringer of death, why do you insist on using such magic when I'm right next to you? Come and talk to me.

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: A bringer of death calls from afar. What do you desire?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... Nothing...

sections.title: Via an enchanted gem or a Slayer ring during a task

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: A bringer of death calls from afar. What do you desire?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I doing so far?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: You're currently assigned to bring balance to [monster] in [area]; you have [amount] more to go. Your reward point tally is [amount].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: I am Konar quo Maten. Like you, I am a bringer of death. Together, we can serve the balance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are you?

lines.speaker: Konar quo Maten
lines.text: You'll find me on Mount Karuulm. I'll be here when you need a new purpose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing really.
